title: Dense German Meat Salad
description: A hearty, grassy German dish perfect for a crowd-pleaser that combines miso-marinate with chilled butter, suitable for shojin-friendly diet.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine miso paste, apple cider vinegar, Dijon mustard, salt, black pepper, and garlic, and blend until smooth.
Cut the Bavarian sausage into 1-inch pieces and set aside.
In a large bowl, combine the chopped parsley, dill, and chives.
Add the sliced red onion to the bowl and toss to combine.
Add the miso marinade to the bowl and toss to coat.
Add the chilled butter to the bowl and toss until the salad is well coated.
Add the sausage pieces to the bowl and toss gently to combine.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, give the salad a good stir and adjust the seasoning if needed.
Serve the salad chilled, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
